**Checklist**
- [ ] `python tests/test_smoke.py` passes offline (no API key)
- [ ] New logic has offline test coverage
- [ ] No secrets in code, tests, fixtures, or docs
- [ ] New connections/credentials go through `security.py`; model-driven actions respect permissions + schema validation
- [ ] This is my original work, contributed under the MIT license
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (or justified below)
